content:
# Diabetes Management Journal

## Latest A1C
A1C: 7.4% (November 2025 reading)
Target: <7.0%
Trend: Need to improve

## Medications
- Metformin 1000mg BID
- Glipizide 5mg daily
- Fasting glucose checks 3x/week

## Notes
- Holiday season makes management harder
- Busy October-April restaurant season = more stress eating
- Need to schedule October lab draw

# Vendor Notes

## Greek Imports NY
- Premium olive oil supplier
- Specialty cheeses and honey
- Contact: orders@greekimportsny.com

## Parthenon Wholesale Meats
- Primary meat supplier
- Lamb, goat, chicken

## Freshpoint FL
- Produce supplier
- Prices increased 8% September 2026
